name: libbluetooth3
title: libbluetooth3
summary: Library to use the BlueZ Linux Bluetooth stack
description:
Library to use the BlueZ Linux Bluetooth stack
BlueZ is the official Linux Bluetooth protocol stack. It is an Open Source
project distributed under GNU General Public License (GPL).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libbluetooth3 because Library to use the BlueZ Linux Bluetooth stack.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libbluetooth3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libbluetooth3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libbluetooth3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
